name: postal-code-callout
rationale: Cross-doc postal-code discrepancy: loan_application doc shows T6R 2K8 while appraisal shows T6R 2K9 for the same Subject Property Address. F1.PC source-hierarchy captures both values with distinct source classifications; F4.PC injectPostalCodeDiscrepancyCallout fires injecting Risk Factors callout in admin prelim. Property Address row in Snapshot is street-address-only (postal stripped per R11-C M1).
notes: Single-event sequence. Per Porter framing #3 Phase 4: assert F4.PC callout text injected in admin email + assert Snapshot row does NOT contain inline postal suffix (R11-C M1).
